housing.name: Housing
housing.description: Affordability and quality of the residential real estate market

cost_of_living.name: Affordability
cost_of_living.description: Affordability of everyday goods and services relative to local salaries; higher score means cheaper city

startups.name: Startup Ecosystem
startups.description: Strength of the local startup scene, including founders, accelerators, and growth companies

venture_capital.name: Venture Capital
venture_capital.description: Availability of VC funding and investment activity for businesses

travel_connectivity.name: Travel Connectivity
travel_connectivity.description: Quality of international and domestic flight connections from the city

commute.name: Commute
commute.description: Ease and efficiency of daily commuting; higher score means shorter and less stressful commutes

business_freedom.name: Business Freedom
business_freedom.description: Ease of starting and operating a business, including regulatory environment

safety.name: Safety
safety.description: Level of personal safety and low crime rate in the city

healthcare.name: Healthcare
healthcare.description: Quality and accessibility of medical services and health infrastructure

education.name: Education
education.description: Quality and availability of educational institutions, from schools to universities

environmental_quality.name: Environment
environmental_quality.description: Air quality, green spaces, water cleanliness, and overall ecological health

economy.name: Economy
economy.description: Overall economic strength, job market vitality, and employment opportunities

taxation.name: Taxation
taxation.description: Favorability of the tax regime for individuals and businesses; higher score means lower tax burden

internet_access.name: Internet Access
internet_access.description: Quality and reach of internet infrastructure and connectivity

leisure_&_culture.name: Leisure & Culture
leisure_&_culture.description: Richness of entertainment, arts, restaurants, nightlife, and cultural attractions

tolerance.name: Tolerance
tolerance.description: Social diversity and openness toward minorities, LGBTQ+ individuals, and immigrants

outdoors.name: Outdoors
outdoors.description: Access to parks, nature, and outdoor activities

avg_monthly_net_salary.name: Monthly Salary
avg_monthly_net_salary.description: Average monthly net salary after income tax

sun_year.name: Yearly Sunshine
sun_year.description: Average total sunshine hours per year

population.name: Population
population.description: City population; contextual info, not a direct quality metric

mcmeal_combo.name: Meal Price
mcmeal_combo.description: Price of a standard fast-food combo meal; lower means cheaper daily food costs

internet_60mbps.name: Internet Cost
internet_60mbps.description: Monthly cost of a 60 Mbps broadband internet plan; lower means more affordable connectivity
